questions.prompt: What numbers are included in range(1, 10)?
questions.explanation: range(1, 10) starts at 1 and stops BEFORE 10, so the last number is 9.

questions.prompt: What numbers are included in range(5)?
questions.explanation: range(5) with one argument always starts at 0 and stops BEFORE 5.

questions.prompt: What is the LAST number produced by range(3, 9)?
questions.explanation: range(3, 9) stops BEFORE 9, so the last number is 8.

questions.prompt: Which line starts a loop that runs exactly 10 times?
questions.explanation: range(10) produces 10 numbers (0 to 9). Don't forget the colon!

questions.prompt: Which of these is a valid first line of a for loop?
questions.explanation: A for loop needs 'in', brackets around the range, and a colon at the end.

questions.prompt: Write the range() call that produces: 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
Write the range() call that produces: 0, 2, 4, 6, 8
Write the first line only of a loop where i goes from 1 to 10 (include the colon)
Write the first line only of a loop that runs exactly 3 times (include the colon)
Write a complete for loop that prints every number from 1 to 5
